name: @kaiord/internal-shared-assets
description: Non-publishable assets shared across extension packages (icon master SVG, popup CSS master). NOT distributed via npm; consumed at build time by repo-root scripts. Promote individual sub-trees to a published @kaiord/* package only if they grow runtime code.

scripts.lint: echo 'No source code — assets only' && exit 0
scripts.test: echo 'No source code — assets only' && exit 0
scripts.build: echo 'No source code — assets only' && exit 0
